title: citrus halimii
intro: Citrus halimii, also known as the 'Wild Orange', is a small, evergreen shrub native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of limonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Citrus halimii include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and even exhibit antioxidant and anti-aging effects. Traditionally, Citrus halimii has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
